message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'dma_set_seg_boundary' sets signal field 'device_dma_parameters.segment_boundary_mask', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=device_dma_parameters;field=segment_boundary_mask;offset=8] [oracle:assert=device_dma_parameters.segment_boundary_mask stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets segment_boundary_mask without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
